creator: i@levsha.me
text:
Update audio/liquidsoap to 0.9.3 bugfix release.
Use USERS & GROUPS variables for create required use and group (pkg-install.in is not required now)
Remove version from some patch file names: only update patch files required in future when version changed.

Fix: Use patch below.
Please remove
pkg-install.in patch-liquidsoap-0.9.2__Makefile patch-liquidsoap-0.9.2__Makefile.defs.in patch-liquidsoap-0.9.2__doc__Makefile patch-liquidsoap-0.9.2__examples__Makefile patch-ocaml-ao-0.1.10_src_ao__stubs.c
from files/ directory
